title: Sparkwright Config
description: User-editable settings shared by the CLI and the interactive TUI. Loaded (in order, later overriding earlier) from ~/.config/sparkwright/config.{json,yaml,yml}, <workspace>/.sparkwright/config.{json,yaml,yml}, and $SPARKWRIGHT_CONFIG. Within a user/project layer, config.json wins over config.yaml, which wins over config.yml; multiple files in one layer are reported as a conflict. CLI args and env vars override files. Fields may be written flat or under the preferred groups identity/policy/run/ui; tools and capabilities are top-level groups. A field set both ways conflicts and the grouped value wins. The providers map is merged by key, tools.use and tools.allowed intersect, tools.disabled unions, tools.defer is replaced by later layers, capabilities merges by sub-capability, and the security boundaries - shell.sandbox, run.accessMode, confidentialPaths, and write - merge conservatively so later layers cannot weaken an earlier layer's policy (project clamps user); confidentialDefaults is an explicit later-layer override for the built-in confidential path set; other shared fields are wholesale-overridden.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this JSON Schema so editors can offer completion and validation. Ignored by the loader.

npm.description: AI SDK package used to construct the client. Defaults to "@ai-sdk/openai".

baseURL.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Overridden by the OPENAI_BASE_URL env var when set.

apiKey.description: API key for this provider. Overridden by provider-specific env vars when set.

providerOptions.description: Request-level AI SDK providerOptions keyed by provider namespace.

cost.description: Per-million-token pricing used to attach costUsd to usage.

providerOptions.description: Request-level AI SDK providerOptions keyed by provider namespace.

models.description: Optional per-model metadata. When any models are listed, model overrides must use one of those ids.

providers.description: Named model providers. The reserved name "deterministic" is built in and must not be declared here.

accessMode.description: High-level run autonomy preset. The single user-facing access knob; compiles internally to permissionMode + write capability. read-only=plan/no-write, ask=approve writes, accept-edits=auto-accept edits, bypass=auto-approve.

backgroundTasks.description: Session-level foreground/background task policy. enabled allows task promotion and detached tasks; foreground-only forces task_create to wait inline; disabled rejects new task_create work.

workspace.description: Workspace root for runs. Relative paths resolve from the directory of the config file that defined them.

confidentialPaths.description: Additional read-confidentiality paths or globs whose contents a run must not read.

confidentialDefaults.description: Whether runs include SparkWright's built-in conservative confidential path defaults. Defaults to true.

maxFiles.description: Maximum distinct files a run may write.

maxDiffLines.description: Maximum changed diff lines per write.

allowDeletions.description: Whether in-place edits may remove lines.

write.description: Workspace write guardrails. Merges conservatively across layers.

runBudget.description: Resource budget for the interactive main run. maxModelCalls is the tightest natural step bound.

traceLevel.description: Default trace verbosity when an entrypoint does not pass one. CLI --trace-level overrides.

shellSafe.description: Auto-approve commands the safety classifier rates safe.

cronMode.description: Default permission mode for unattended cron run/tick commands. CLI --access-mode still overrides.

approvals.description: Default approval auto-grants. CLI flags still override these values.

foregroundTimeoutMs.description: Foreground shell budget in milliseconds before promotion to a background task. Defaults to 300000 and is capped at 600000.

mode.description: off disables OS sandboxing; warn uses it when available; enforce fails shell execution when sandboxing is unavailable.

failIfUnavailable.description: Fail closed when the platform sandbox runtime is unavailable.

sandbox.description: OS-level process sandbox for local command execution. Forced deny-write paths are always appended by the host.

anyOf.description: Select tools from one configured MCP server, e.g. mcp:demo.

use.description: High-level source/capability selectors retained in the prepared tool set. Omit to use all otherwise enabled tools.

allowed.description: Concrete tool names retained in the prepared run tool set. Omit to allow all otherwise enabled tools.

disabled.description: Concrete tool names removed from the prepared run tool set.

defer.description: Concrete built-in tool names prepared as deferred schemas when supported.

tools.description: Preferred tool exposure/loading settings. Standard tools are enabled by default.

budget.description: Shared budget contract for model-backed auxiliary tasks.

tasks.description: Model-backed auxiliary task routing and budget defaults.

http.description: Host-owned allowlist and network policy for HTTP hook actions. Project configs cannot define this policy or HTTP hook actions.

hooks.description: Deterministic workflow hooks and non-blocking event hooks for host-created runs.

verification.description: Project verification profiles compiled by the host into workflow hooks.

roots.description: Skill root directories. Relative paths resolve from the config file that defined them.

loadSelectedSkills.description: Load matcher-selected Skill bodies into resident context.

skills.description: Skill loading settings for host-created runs.

mcp.description: MCP server settings for host-created runs.

spawnModel.description: Optional raw model ref for dynamic spawn_agent children. If unset, they inherit the parent run model.

delegateModel.description: Optional raw model ref for configured in-process delegates when the profile does not set model. ACP and external-command delegates resolve outside the parent process.

exposure.description: Controls direct delegate_* tool exposure. "indexed" exposes non-opted-out agents through list_agents/delegate_agent/delegate_parallel and only exposes pinned or per-profile exposed delegates; "all" exposes every resolved delegate as a direct delegate_* tool. Default indexed.

pinnedDelegates.description: Profile ids or delegate tool names that should remain exposed as direct delegate_* tools when exposure is indexed.

exposeChildrenAsDelegates.description: Opt-in: auto-expose every child/all profile without an explicit delegate as a delegate_<id> tool. Default false. Per-profile exposeAsDelegate overrides this.

enableParallelDelegates.description: Opt-in: expose delegate_parallel for foreground fan-out across read-only configured delegates. Default false. The tool only accepts delegates with workspaceAccess "none".

maxDepth.description: Global sub-agent depth ceiling. 0 disables sub-agent spawning.

allowNestedBackgroundTasks.description: Opt-in: allow sub-agents to create awaited/background agent tasks, bounded by maxDepth.

agents.description: Agent profile run templates for host-created runs.

keybindings.description: Override default key chords for named TUI actions.

npm.description: AI SDK package used to construct the client. Defaults to "@ai-sdk/openai".

baseURL.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Overridden by the OPENAI_BASE_URL env var when set.

apiKey.description: API key for this provider. Overridden by provider-specific env vars when set.

providerOptions.description: Request-level AI SDK providerOptions keyed by provider namespace.

cost.description: Per-million-token pricing used to attach costUsd to usage.

providerOptions.description: Request-level AI SDK providerOptions keyed by provider namespace.

models.description: Optional per-model metadata. When any models are listed, model overrides must use one of those ids.

providers.description: Named model providers. The reserved name "deterministic" is built in and must not be declared here.

identity.description: Preferred grouping for who/what runs. Flattens to model/providers.

confidentialPaths.description: Additional read-confidentiality paths or globs whose contents a run must not read.

confidentialDefaults.description: Whether runs include SparkWright's built-in conservative confidential path defaults. Defaults to true.

maxFiles.description: Maximum distinct files a run may write.

maxDiffLines.description: Maximum changed diff lines per write.

allowDeletions.description: Whether in-place edits may remove lines.

write.description: Workspace write guardrails. Merges conservatively across layers.

mode.description: off disables OS sandboxing; warn uses it when available; enforce fails shell execution when sandboxing is unavailable.

failIfUnavailable.description: Fail closed when the platform sandbox runtime is unavailable.

sandbox.description: OS-level process sandbox for local command execution. Forced deny-write paths are always appended by the host.

policy.description: Preferred grouping for security boundaries. Flattens to confidentialPaths/write and shell.sandbox. Run autonomy lives in run.accessMode.

accessMode.description: High-level run autonomy preset. The single user-facing access knob; compiles internally to permissionMode + write capability. read-only=plan/no-write, ask=approve writes, accept-edits=auto-accept edits, bypass=auto-approve.

backgroundTasks.description: Session-level foreground/background task policy. enabled allows task promotion and detached tasks; foreground-only forces task_create to wait inline; disabled rejects new task_create work.

budget.description: Resource budget for the interactive main run. maxModelCalls is the tightest natural step bound.

traceLevel.description: Default trace verbosity when an entrypoint does not pass one. CLI --trace-level overrides.

shellSafe.description: Auto-approve commands the safety classifier rates safe.

cronMode.description: Default permission mode for unattended cron run/tick commands. CLI --access-mode still overrides.

approvals.description: Default approval auto-grants. CLI flags still override these values.

run.description: Preferred grouping for run-shaping defaults. Flattens to accessMode/backgroundTasks/runBudget/maxSteps/traceLevel/approvals.

keybindings.description: Override default key chords for named TUI actions.

ui.description: Preferred grouping for TUI-only preferences. Flattens to theme/mouse/keybindings.
